global.description: The ad features a central card illustration with a clear call to action and brand logo.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial tracking service with instant card signup.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Card illustration
elements.description: An illustration of a card with rounded edges, placed in the center, showcasing a clean design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text stating 'Track every euro' in a prominent font, centered within the ad.

elements.label: Sub-message text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main message that reads 'Fast signup, instant card', also centered.

elements.label: Card detail
elements.description: A detailed illustration of a card, slightly smaller than the main card, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Card feature
elements.description: Another card feature illustration, similar in style to the main card, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Card element
elements.description: A smaller circular element representing a feature of the card, located in the center.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed to stand out.

elements.label: Secondary button
elements.description: A smaller button below the main CTA, featuring a similar design.

elements.label: Footer text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that reinforces the main message, occupying a large area.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Fast signup  instant card

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A clear and inviting button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed for user interaction.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the brand name 'ClearLedger' in a bold font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, ClearLedger logo, card illustration, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Track every euro, Fast signup, instant card, Book now, ClearLedger
